name: sendlens
description: Agentic reasoning over Instantly data with a privacy-first local cache.

scripts.build:hosts: pluxx build --target claude-code cursor codex opencode
scripts.ci:plugin: npm run test:plugin && npm run validate:plugin && npm run lint:plugin && npm run build:hosts
scripts.test:plugin: npm run --silent build:plugin && node scripts/test-local-plugin-sampling.mjs && node scripts/test-local-plugin-runtime.mjs
